title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Unknown person #9, Franky, Dadan, Unknown person #3, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #9, Franky, Dadan, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Yes... it's pathetic, but I was careless,

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Crap, that guy was with brew jam?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: This is bad, we stole from him!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That idiot better not say anything!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #9, Franky, Dadan, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.
